summary: Ukraine's post-quantum activity surfaces through the State Scientific and Research Institute of Cybersecurity Technologies and Information Protection, a body under the State Service of Special Communications, which organises the UkrCrypto cryptographic research conference whose thematic sections include post-quantum and quantum cryptography. No national post-quantum standard, algorithm choice or migration timeline has been published.
govActors: SSSCIP / DerzhNDI (State Scientific and Research Institute of Cybersecurity Technologies and Information Protection) | Research institute under the State Service of Special Communications, organiser of the UkrCrypto2026 conference with a post-quantum and quantum cryptography section

dominantProcess re-classified NIST by best-available signal (low): the only included document is the SSSCIP institute's UkrCrypto2026 conference call with a post-quantum section - generic research engagement with no sovereign PQC scheme named, so it defaults to NIST.
